info.name: HypeEngine API v1
info.description:
Complete API collection for HypeEngine API v1 endpoints. All endpoints require Bearer token authentication.

## Authentication

All requests require an `Authorization` header with a Bearer token:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your-access-token>
```

## Base URL

Set the `base_url` variable to your Mixpost instance URL (e.g., `http://localhost:3000` or `https://your-domain.com`).

## Variables

- `base_url`: Your Mixpost instance base URL
- `project_uuid`: Project UUID for testing
- `access_token`: Your API access token (Bearer token)

request.description:
Create a new post. If `scheduled_at` is provided, the post will be scheduled; otherwise, it will be created as a draft.

**Required fields:**
- `accounts`: Array of account UUIDs (at least one required)
- `content.body`: Post content in HTML format

**Optional fields:**
- `content.media`: Array of media UUIDs
- `content.tags`: Array of tag UUIDs
- `scheduled_at`: ISO 8601 date string for scheduling

header.value: x-session-id=s%3AFGtdiFgqUh0D6PLJR9wuAyHwTlMdFueV.agP4%2BK4NIQu%2FSCmUwBUr53WRHi9Wxo7BY%2BL2ygMsFO0; Path=/; Expires=Tue, 13 Jan 2026 13:16:25 GMT; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict
